findings.message: The `widgetizer` runtime service is defined only in `dev.yml` (profiles: ["dev"]), so it reaches dev but NOT staging/prod. Per the deploy composition (strategy.sh: `<env>.yml + services.yml + observability.yml`), `dev.yml` is a dev/test-only overlay and is never composed in staging/prod. This is not local-developer-experience tooling (it runs a versioned application image `ghcr.io/acme/widgetizer:1.4.0`, holds a Postgres connection, and gates on `postgres: service_healthy`) — it is an app-tier dependency that will silently be absent in production.
findings.suggestion: Move the `widgetizer` service definition to `infra/compose/services.yml` (the battery service overlay that staging/prod compose alongside `<env>.yml` and `observability.yml`) so it reaches every deployed environment, or add it to each deployed `<env>.yml` (staging.yml/prod.yml) directly. Do NOT place it in `base.yml`, which only reaches dev/test. If dev-only is genuinely intended, record it in the decisions log rather than leaving it silently omitted from prod.
